name: ioffice-mcp
description: iOffice workspace and facility management for Claude — book rooms, manage visitors, file maintenance requests, and more via natural language

ioffice_token.title: API Token
ioffice_token.description: Your iOffice API token (preferred over username/password)

ioffice_username.title: Username
ioffice_username.description: Your iOffice username (used if no API token is set)

ioffice_password.title: Password
ioffice_password.description: Your iOffice password (used if no API token is set)

tools.name: io_list_buildings
tools.description: List iOffice buildings with search, pagination, and sorting

tools.name: io_get_building
tools.description: Get a single building by ID

tools.name: io_create_building
tools.description: Create a new building

tools.name: io_update_building
tools.description: Update an existing building

tools.name: io_delete_building
tools.description: Delete a building by ID

tools.name: io_list_floors
tools.description: List floors, optionally filtered by building

tools.name: io_get_floor
tools.description: Get a single floor by ID

tools.name: io_create_floor
tools.description: Create a new floor within a building

tools.name: io_update_floor
tools.description: Update an existing floor

tools.name: io_delete_floor
tools.description: Delete a floor by ID

tools.name: io_list_spaces
tools.description: List spaces (rooms), optionally filtered by floor

tools.name: io_get_space
tools.description: Get a single space (room) by ID

tools.name: io_create_space
tools.description: Create a new space (room) on a floor

tools.name: io_update_space
tools.description: Update an existing space

tools.name: io_delete_space
tools.description: Delete a space by ID

tools.name: io_list_users
tools.description: List iOffice users with search, pagination, and sorting

tools.name: io_get_user
tools.description: Get a single user by ID

tools.name: io_create_user
tools.description: Create a new user

tools.name: io_update_user
tools.description: Update an existing user

tools.name: io_delete_user
tools.description: Delete a user by ID

tools.name: io_list_reservations
tools.description: List reservations with filtering by date range, space, or user

tools.name: io_get_reservation
tools.description: Get a single reservation by ID

tools.name: io_create_reservation
tools.description: Book a room/space reservation

tools.name: io_update_reservation
tools.description: Update an existing reservation

tools.name: io_delete_reservation
tools.description: Cancel/delete a reservation by ID

tools.name: io_checkin_reservation
tools.description: Check in to a reservation, confirming room usage

tools.name: io_checkout_reservation
tools.description: Check out of a reservation, releasing the room

tools.name: io_list_visitors
tools.description: List visitors with search and date filtering

tools.name: io_get_visitor
tools.description: Get a single visitor by ID

tools.name: io_create_visitor
tools.description: Pre-register a visitor

tools.name: io_update_visitor
tools.description: Update an existing visitor record

tools.name: io_checkin_visitor
tools.description: Check in a visitor upon arrival

tools.name: io_checkout_visitor
tools.description: Check out a visitor upon departure

tools.name: io_list_maintenance_requests
tools.description: List maintenance requests, filterable by status, space, or building

tools.name: io_get_maintenance_request
tools.description: Get a single maintenance request by ID

tools.name: io_create_maintenance_request
tools.description: File a new maintenance request

tools.name: io_update_maintenance_request
tools.description: Update an existing maintenance request

tools.name: io_accept_maintenance_request
tools.description: Accept a maintenance request (pending to accepted)

tools.name: io_start_maintenance_request
tools.description: Start work on a maintenance request

tools.name: io_complete_maintenance_request
tools.description: Mark a maintenance request as complete

tools.name: io_archive_maintenance_request
tools.description: Archive a completed maintenance request

tools.name: io_list_mail
tools.description: List mail items (packages and letters) with filtering

tools.name: io_get_mail
tools.description: Get a single mail item by ID

tools.name: io_create_mail
tools.description: Log a new mail item (package or letter) received

tools.name: io_deliver_mail
tools.description: Mark a mail item as delivered to the recipient

tools.name: io_return_mail
tools.description: Mark a mail item as returned to sender

tools.name: io_list_moves
tools.description: List move requests, filterable by status, building, or assignee

tools.name: io_get_move
tools.description: Get a single move request by ID

tools.name: io_create_move
tools.description: Create a new move request

tools.name: io_update_move
tools.description: Update an existing move request

tools.name: io_approve_move
tools.description: Approve a move request

tools.name: io_cancel_move
tools.description: Cancel a move request
